testcase.name: @BeforeMethod openBrowser
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.NoSuchSessionException: Session ID is null. Using WebDriver after calling quit()? testcase.name: TC33_VerifyCheckoutWithEmptyCart

failure.message: Checkout page should not appear for empty cart expected [false] but found [true]
